category.scope_note: Filtering facepiece respirator compliance comparison for exports from China to Turkey under Customs Union-aligned CE / TSE expectations, with EN 149 / EU PPE Regulation requirements, Turkish market surveillance, and China domestic GB baseline mapping.

title.en: China-to-Turkey PPE Respirator Compliance Gap Matrix
title.zh: 中国口罩呼吸器进入土耳其合规差距矩阵
title.zht: 中國口罩呼吸器進入土耳其合規差距矩陣

description.en: Cross-standard comparison for filtering facepiece respirators exported from China to Turkey where Turkey aligns with EU PPE concepts through the Customs Union, applies CE-marked PPE logic, and uses TSE national adoptions of EN standards as TS EN product references.
description.zh: 本对比面向中国出口土耳其的过滤式半面罩呼吸器，反映土耳其通过欧盟关税同盟在PPE上采用欧盟逻辑并采用CE及TS EN参考框架，以及TSE在市场监督场景下的国标转采用。
description.zht: 本對比面向中國出口土耳其的過濾式半面罩呼吸器，反映土耳其透過歐盟關稅同盟在PPE上採用歐盟邏輯並採用CE及TS EN參考框架，以及TSE在市場監督場景下的國標採用。

disclaimer.en: This comparison is informational only and does not constitute certification, legal advice, customs classification, market-surveillance ruling, or port admission decision. Exporters should verify Turkey-bound CE / TSE documentation, importer obligations, market-authority requirements, and logistics documents before shipment through qualified Turkish professionals. Mersin and Istanbul (Ambarlı) are listed operationally as common entry points but may change by route and product type.
disclaimer.zh: 本页仅供信息参考，不构成认证结论、法律意见、关税归类、市场监督裁定或口岸放行决定。出口商应在发运前由具备资质的土耳其专业人员核实土耳其CE/TSE文件、进口商责任、主管机关要求及物流文件。常见入境口岸为默森（Mersin）和伊斯坦布尔阿姆巴勒（Ambarlı），但不同路线和产品类型可能不同。
disclaimer.zht: 本頁僅供資訊參考，不構成認證結論、法律意見、關稅歸類、市場監督裁定或口岸放行決定。出口商應在發運前由具備資質的土耳其專業人員核實土耳其CE/TSE文件、進口商責任、主管機關要求及物流文件。常見入境口岸為默森（Mersin）和伊斯坦堡阿姆巴勒（Ambarlı），但不同路線和產品類型可能不同。

answer_first.en: For Turkey, filtering respirators (FFP1 / FFP2 / FFP3 intent) are treated through the EU PPE route transposed into the Turkish market context: Regulation (EU) 2016/425 logic applies via Customs Union alignment, EN 149 is the core technical standard, and Category III conformity requires mandatory Notified Body involvement (Module B and Module C2 or D). CN GB 2626-2019 reports are technical input only and are not a direct substitute for Turkish placement. In-country import, distributor and representative support is required for Turkish market handling, and product logistics commonly route through Mersin and Istanbul Ambarlı.
answer_first.zh: 土耳其的过滤式呼吸器（FFP1/FFP2/FFP3用途）按与欧盟对齐的PPE路径处理：通过关税同盟的转换采用《欧盟PPE法规》逻辑，EN 149为核心技术标准，III类产品需强制公告机构参与（模块B及模块C2或D）。中国GB 2626-2019报告仅为技术输入，不可直接替代土耳其投放。土耳其市场需有境内进口商、代理与代表配合处理，并且物流通常以默森、伊斯坦布尔阿姆巴勒为常见进口口岸。
answer_first.zht: 土耳其的過濾式呼吸器（FFP1/FFP2/FFP3用途）按與歐盟對齊的PPE路徑處理：透過關稅同盟的轉換採用《歐盟PPE法規》邏輯，EN 149為核心技術標準，III類產品需強制公告機構參與（模組B及模組C2或D）。中國GB 2626-2019報告僅為技術輸入，不可直接替代土耳其投放。土耳其市場需有境內進口商、代理與代表配合處理，且物流通常以默森、伊斯坦堡阿姆巴勒為常見進口口岸。

editorial_controls.change_policy: Topline rows must keep dataset_id, schema_version, accessed date, and source list in sync when Turkey market law or TSE equivalence references change.
